text: Hello. Hello. Hey, good morning, James here from Nova Health Care, Mississippi. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that can help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to see if you qualify for this, can you please share your age? No, I'm not going to share my age.
